questions.question: Describe the three main components of the environment and their interrelation. (5 marks)
What is the role of the biophysical environment in supporting human life and activities? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Provides natural resources, regulates climate and weather, and affects human health

questions.question: Explain how human activities impact the human component of the environment. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Can lead to depletion of natural resources, pollution, and loss of biodiversity
